title: Broadcom VMware security advisory (AV26-394)
description: On April 24, 2026, Broadcom published a security advisory to address critical vulnerabilities in the following products:
products: VMware Tanzu Data Lake  versions prior to 4.0.0
VMware Tanzu Greenplum Platform Extension Framework  versions prior to 8.0.0
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
